content:
{
  "market_assessment": {
    "bias": "BULLISH",
    "reasoning": "Broad-based rally with all sectors green; PSU Banks +1.71%, Auto +1.47%, IT +1.14% leading. VIX easing to 17.47 (-2.46%) supports risk-on. Held book is +₹6,744 unrealized — focus is trailing SLs and protecting gains, not stacking new entries.",
    "key_levels": {
      "nifty_support": 24000,
      "nifty_resistance": 24350
    }
  },
  "decisions": [
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "PNBHOUSING",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 1036.25,
      "new_target": 1110.00,
      "confidence": 0.75,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "HOLD-equivalent: position +7.7% with SL already at 1036.25 (+5.3% above entry, locks ~5.3% gain). CMP 1053.90 vs SL 1036.25 = 1.7% gap — BELOW the 1% trail-gap discipline floor would mean tightening further is risky. Keeping SL where it is; not a no-op because I'm explicitly affirming current levels are appropriate given +7.7% lock and 1.7% gap to CMP. Actually this is a no-op MODIFY — converting to HOLD."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "PNBHOUSING",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.75,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Position +7.7% with SL 1036.25 already locking +5.3% gain. CMP 1053.90, SL gap 1.7% — appropriate trail given the recent run from 984 in 0 days. Q4 results were strong (PAT +19% YoY, disbursements +36%), thesis intact. Target 1110 still ~5.3% upside; let it run."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "GOLDBEES",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.6,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Down 1.1% with SL at 119 (4% below CMP 123.67). Gold supported by US-Iran tensions and weak rupee. Position intact, SL appropriate, no MODIFY needed."
    },
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "ADANIPORTS",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 1715.00,
      "new_target": 1820.00,
      "confidence": 0.7,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "No-op suppressed — converting to HOLD. SL already at 1715 = entry+0.9% (locked breakeven+). CMP 1737, SL gap 1.27%. Within trail-gap floor. Stock at 52-wk high; momentum strong. Target 1820 intact."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "ADANIPORTS",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.7,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "+2.3% with SL 1715 locking small gain. CMP 1737 just printed 52-wk high 1751 today. Q4 strong (PAT +9.4%, EBITDA +20%). SL gap 1.27% is at the floor — tightening further risks self-stopout on normal noise. Hold for target 1820."
    },
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "BANDHANBNK",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 206.00,
      "new_target": 222.00,
      "confidence": 0.7,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Position +0.04% (essentially breakeven). PSU Bank +1.71% strength, BANDHANBNK Q4 turnaround (PAT +68% YoY), printed 52-wk high 210.63 today. Tightening SL from 204 to 206 (-1.4% from CMP 208.90) — meets 1% trail-gap floor, locks small gain ~-1.4% from entry rather than -2.4%. Trail-up justified by 52-wk high break. Target 222 intact."
    },
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "HAL",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 4575.00,
      "new_target": 4875.00,
      "confidence": 0.7,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Position +1.4%, CMP 4636. Tightening SL from 4540 to 4575 (entry = breakeven). CMP-SL gap 1.33%, meets 1% floor. NOTE: Q4/FY26 board meeting May 14 — within 5-6 sessions, getting close to binary-event window. Will reassess for further tightening or exit closer to event. Target 4875 intact."
    },
    {
      "action": "EXIT",
      "symbol": "BHEL",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "quantity": 130,
      "order_type": "MARKET",
      "confidence": 0.65,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "BHEL -1.6% and FADING -2.23% today vs broader market +0.5-1.5% rally. Q4 was strong (PAT +156%) but stock already ran +57% in a month BEFORE my entry; analyst consensus target ~₹258 sits well BELOW CMP ₹369 — crowded long with profit-taking now visible. Today's high 378 → CMP 368.65 is a -2.5% intraday fade on 4.2x volume = distribution. SL 372 is just 1% below CMP and likely to trigger; better to exit on my terms now at -1.6% than get stopped at -2.1%. Capital redeployment to better setups."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "SOBHA",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.65,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Position -2.1% but CMP 1457 vs SL 1420 has 2.5% buffer. Q4 was outstanding (PAT +124.8%, pre-sales +30%, net-debt negative). Stock spiked to 1577 intraday May 5 then closed 1485 — volatile but thesis intact. Target 1570. Let it work; SL 1420 is the line."
    },
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "NAVINFLUOR",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 6900.00,
      "new_target": 7400.00,
      "confidence": 0.7,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "No-op suppressed → HOLD. SL already at entry/breakeven 6900. CMP 6995, gap 1.36%, meets floor. Q4 beat (EPS +5.5% above consensus), specialty chem tailwinds. Target 7400 intact."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "NAVINFLUOR",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.7,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "+2.4% with SL at entry 6900 (breakeven lock). CMP 6995, gap 1.36% meets trail-gap floor. Q4 beat strong, target 7400 intact. Hold."
    }
  ],
  "position_actions": [
    {
      "symbol": "PNBHOUSING",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": 1036.25,
      "reasoning": "+7.7% with SL locking +5.3%. Trail-gap 1.7%, do not tighten further."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "GOLDBEES",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": 119.00,
      "reasoning": "Hedge position, SL appropriate."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "ADANIPORTS",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": 1715.00,
      "reasoning": "SL already locks breakeven+. Gap to CMP 1.27% at trail-gap floor."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "BANDHANBNK",
      "current_action": "TRAIL_SL",
      "new_stop_loss": 206.00,
      "reasoning": "Trail SL up from 204 to 206 — 52-wk high break, lock tighter at -1.4%."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "HAL",
      "current_action": "TRAIL_SL",
      "new_stop_loss": 4575.00,
      "reasoning": "Trail SL up from 4540 to entry 4575 = breakeven. May 14 board meeting approaching — reassess closer to event."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "BHEL",
      "current_action": "EXIT",
      "new_stop_loss": null,
      "reasoning": "Distribution signal: -2.23% on 4.2x volume vs market rally. Crowded long, exit at -1.6% rather than -2.1% SL."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "SOBHA",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": 1420.00,
      "reasoning": "Q4 strong; let it work to target. SL has 2.5% buffer."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "NAVINFLUOR",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": 6900.00,
      "reasoning": "SL at entry, gap 1.36%. Q4 beat intact, target 7400."
    }
  ],
  "watchlist_notes": "M&M, COFORGE, CAMS, VEDL, MARICO, AUROPHARMA all gapped up 5-12% on Q4 results — chasing into post-result spikes is the worst entry quality. Wait for either (a) consolidation/pullback to 5-EMA or (b) Day-2 follow-through breakout above today's high. CHOLAHLDNG board meeting May 8 — binary event window, NO_ACTION on entry. TITAGARH already has a working LIMIT 838 BUY from earlier; not stacking. CMP for TITAGARH not in deep-dive but order is OPEN — will let it work or cancel if setup deteriorates next tick.",
  "portfolio_notes": "Day 17, +0.75% cumulative. Book is well-deployed at 43% with 8 CNC positions across diverse sectors (HFC, Gold, Ports, Bank, Defence, Capital Goods, Realty, Chemicals). Three winners (+1.4% to +7.7%) being trailed appropriately; exiting BHEL on distribution signal frees ~₹50K capital. Rest of session: monitor TITAGARH pending order, watch for follow-through entries on Q4 winners on Day-2 confirmation. HAL board meeting May 14 is approaching binary-event 3-session window by next Monday — pre-commit to either trim or exit by Tuesday next week. Win rate 19% on 5-day rolling is uncomfortably low but profit factor 1.7x indicates wins are larger than losses — sizing discipline working."
}
